overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval rural village with thatched-roof wooden houses, transitioning to a waterfront path with a large stone castle in the background. The scene features villagers and soldiers in a sunny, clear environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village dirt path with wooden huts

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt path through a rural village, passing villagers and wooden huts

notable_agents.action: woman in brown dress walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: rustic wooden hut with straw roof and log walls
simple wooden picket fence lining the path
worn dirt trail through the village with grass verges

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through a sunny rural village, passing wooden huts with thatched roofs. A woman in a brown dress walks ahead, and a cow stands near a fence on the right. The environment is open with clear skies and moderate vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village alley between timber-framed buildings

events.description: path narrows between closely packed wooden buildings entering the village center

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through narrower village streets passing timber-framed houses and villagers

notable_agents.action: villager in brown cloak walking toward the camera

entered.detail: multi-story medieval house with exposed wooden beams and plaster walls
wooden wagon with large wheels parked beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows between closely packed timber-framed buildings as Geralt moves deeper into the village. A wooden cart sits on the right, and villagers walk in opposing directions. The thatched huts of the outskirts fade behind as the architecture shifts to denser medieval construction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront area with castle view

events.description: exiting the village buildings to reveal the waterfront and large medieval castle with red towers
approaching the riverbank with boats visible on the shore

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward the waterfront as the castle comes into view, passing from the village to the open riverbank

entered.detail: large stone fortress with multiple red-roofed towers and defensive walls
calm waterway running alongside the path with boats moored
arched stone bridge connecting the shore to the castle entrance
small wooden boat beached on the riverbank

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the narrow village streets into a wide-open waterfront area, revealing a massive medieval castle with distinctive red towers across the river. The dirt path continues along the shore where wooden boats are moored, and a stone bridge spans the water toward the castle gates.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone waterfront promenade with castle walls

events.description: path surface changes from dirt to cobblestone near the castle walls
passing a group of soldiers standing guard along the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the cobblestone waterfront path passing soldiers in red armor, approaching the castle entrance area

notable_agents.action: soldier in red armor and helmet standing guard with spear
soldier in armor walking along the path

entered.detail: worn stone cobblestones replacing the dirt trail near the castle
directional sign with multiple arrows mounted on wooden post

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to cobblestone as Geralt walks along the waterfront promenade. Soldiers in red armor stand guard along the route, and a wooden signpost marks the way. The castle walls loom large on the left while the river continues alongside, with the village buildings now distant behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open outskirts of a sunny rural village into a dense medieval settlement that eventually opens onto a grand waterfront. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path past thatched-roof huts and grazing livestock under a clear sky. As he moves deeper into the village, the path narrows and the architecture shifts toward closely packed timber-framed buildings and crowded streets filled with villagers. The scene then expands as Geralt emerges from the narrow lanes into a wide-open waterfront area, revealing a massive medieval castle with red towers across a river dotted with moored boats. Finally, the dirt path transitions into a cobblestone promenade lined with soldiers in red armor, with the castle walls looming large as the village buildings fade into the distance.
